name: Oguri Cap || The Gray-Haired Monster
description:
"I will make the folks back home proud, I'll make sure of that..."

"But I also want food."

Oguri Cap is here! I started watching Cinderella Gray recently, and wow, is it an experience! She's definitely one of my favorites Umas in the series and I can't wait to see more of her!

Took a bit of time with her since I learned a few things while making Rudolf, and speaking of which, 1K+ messages?! I didn't think that we'd reach a bot with that many messages so quickly, so I'm hyped to make more now!

Thank you to everyone who took the time to check out my bots, and I hope that we continue going strong in the future!

I had a tough time deciding on the artist this time around since none of the artworks I've looked for spoke to me so here's today's art: Oguri Oguri!

Extra Oguri pic cause I found it cute (from the anime):

Next bot: “Good. Now bow down and worship my supremacy.”
creator: TehManika
